test_cases.title: Valid login with email and password
test_cases.description: Verifies that a user can log in with valid email and password.
steps: Enter a valid email and password.
test_cases.expected_result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the homepage.

test_cases.title: Invalid login with incorrect password
test_cases.description: Verifies that an error message is displayed when logging in with an incorrect password.
steps: Enter a valid email and an incorrect password.
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials.

test_cases.title: Add product to shopping cart
test_cases.description: Verifies that a user can add a product to the shopping cart.
steps: Browse the store and select a product.
Add the product to the shopping cart.
test_cases.expected_result: Product is successfully added to the shopping cart.

test_cases.title: Checkout with delivery option
test_cases.description: Verifies that a user can proceed to checkout with the delivery option.
steps: Add products to the shopping cart.
test_cases.expected_result: Order is confirmed and saved with the delivery option and address.

test_cases.title: Checkout with pickup option
test_cases.description: Verifies that a user can proceed to checkout with the pickup option.
steps: Add products to the shopping cart.
test_cases.expected_result: Order is confirmed and saved with the pickup option.

test_cases.title: Checkout blocked with empty cart
test_cases.description: Verifies that checkout cannot proceed when the cart has no items.
steps: Ensure the shopping cart is empty.
Attempt to submit a checkout request.
test_cases.expected_result: Checkout is blocked and the system returns an error indicating the cart is empty.

test_cases.title: Order confirmation service integration
test_cases.description: Verifies that the checkout flow correctly calls the order confirmation service.
steps: Call the order confirmation service endpoint: TBD.
Verify the service responds with status code: TBD.
test_cases.expected_result: Order confirmation service returns a success response: TBD.

test_cases.title: Invalid email format validation
test_cases.description: Verifies that the system validates the email format during login.
test_cases.expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid email format.

test_cases.title: Checkout completes successfully
test_cases.description: Verifies that checkout works as expected.

test_cases.title: Validate delivery address format
test_cases.description: Verifies that the delivery address entered by the user follows a valid format.
steps: Add products to the shopping cart.
Verify the order confirmation service receives the correct address.
test_cases.expected_result: The order confirmation service correctly receives and stores the delivery address.

test_cases.title: Complete purchase journey with delivery
test_cases.description: Verifies that a user can log in, add products to the cart, and complete checkout with delivery.
steps: Browse the store and add products to the shopping cart.
Select the delivery option and enter a valid address.
Verify the order confirmation service returns a success response.
test_cases.expected_result: The user successfully completes the purchase and receives an order confirmation with the correct delivery address.
